name: 內心獨白吐槽型（打破第四面牆感）
description: 女主用現代人視角吐槽古代宮廷的荒謬，製造喜劇效果和觀眾認同感。觀眾通過她的吐槽獲得代入感——'我也會這樣想'。
tags: 製造喜劇效果/強化代入感

examples.drama_title: Girl Transmigrated as a Doomed Palace Maid...Modern Knowledge Turned Her Into the Prince’s Treasure
examples.excerpt: This wicked feudal society. The most important thing is to survive. ... According to the usual script for palace dramas, the empress definitely won't truly care for the crown prince. Out of the tiger's den and into the wolf's lair.
examples.context: 製造喜劇效果/強化代入感
